programme.title: De La Swing: Elrow Barcelona (Spain)

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann: Pacha On Air

programme.title: Metodi Hristov: Green Love Festival
programme.desc: With his truly unique style, ranging from the darker side of tech house to the raw house beats, Bulgarian-based Metodi Hristov made himself a name. His recorded set is an incredible combination of different styles. The Green Love Festival atmosphere only amplifies that.

programme.title: PUNKT PUNKT KOMMA STRICH presents: Avant
programme.desc: PUNKT PUNKT KOMMA STRICH presents: Avant PUNKT PUNKT KOMMA STRICH is a Cologne based Crew consisting of four artists united by sharing one vision. The vision to find your own agenda and let nobody get in the way. The vision of sharing their passion for electronic music and shaping the club culture of tomorrow. The vision of sharing their own definition of Melodic House and Techno. Be it within their own productions or DJ sets. The crew tried to transport as many emotions as possible.
